subcodes.first_line: O friends! The world hath never shown, nor shall it ever show, fidelity. At all times it beareth witness to its own evanescence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان دنیا را وفائی نبوده و نیست در جمیع احیان بفنای خود شهادت داده و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Manifestation of God as sun
